atten3.ptxt: The Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) must be input into the replacement ECM.

atten4.ptxt: The VIN is a 17-digit alphanumeric number. The intelligent tester is required to register the VIN.

content1.ptxt: This registration section consists of 3 parts: Input Instructions, Read VIN and Write VIN.

s2.ptxt: Input Instructions: Explains the general VIN input instructions when using the intelligent tester.

Read VIN: Explains the VIN reading process in a flowchart. This process allows the VIN stored in the ECM to be read in order to confirm that the two VINs, provided with the vehicle and stored in the vehicle's ECM, are the same.

Write VIN: Explains the VIN writing process in a flowchart. This process allows the VIN to be input into the ECM. If the ECM is changed, or the vehicle VIN and ECM VIN do not match, the VIN can be registered or overwritten in the ECM by following this procedure.

item.ptxt: The arrow buttons (UP, DOWN, RIGHT and LEFT) and numerical buttons (0 to 9) are used to input the VIN.
To move the cursor around the tester screen, press the RIGHT and LEFT buttons.

s3.ptxt: Press the UP and DOWN buttons to select the desired alphabetical character.
After selection, the cursor should move.
Press the numerical button corresponding to the number that you want to input.
After input, the cursor should move.

atten4.ptxt: Numerical characters can also be selected by using the UP and DOWN buttons.

s3.ptxt: When correcting the input character(s), put the cursor onto the character using the RIGHT and LEFT buttons.
Select or input the correct character using the UP/DOWN buttons, or the numerical buttons.
Make sure that the input VIN matches the vehicle VIN after input.
Press the ENTER button on the tester.

s2.ptxt: Connect the intelligent tester to the DLC3.
Turn the ignition switch to the ON position.
Select the following menu items: DIAGNOSIS / ENHANCED OBD II/ VIN.
Connect the intelligent tester to the DLC3.
Turn the ignition switch to the ON position.
Select the following menu items: DIAGNOSIS / ENHANCED OBD II/ VIN.
